title: ramium hirtum
side_effects: Ramium hirtum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and vomiting due to its high concentration of saponins and alkaloids. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to cardiac problems, including arrhythmias and decreased blood pressure. Additionally, using Ramium hirtum without proper medical supervision can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory issues. Prolonged or excessive use of the plant can also lead to kidney damage and other complications.
